name: Suspicious Screensaver Activity Detected
description: A suspicious modification to the screensaver registry key (SCRNSAVE.EXE) has been detected, which could indicate a persistence attempt by an attacker.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The date and time when the screensaver activity was detected.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that performed the registry modification.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process, if available.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the modifying process, if available.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The screensaver registry key that was modified.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The details or new value set in the registry key (the path to the screensaver binary).
